Serialized Form

  • Package com.sunilos.p4.bean

    • Class com.sunilos.p4.bean.BaseBean

      class BaseBean extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • createdBy
          String createdBy
          Contains USER ID who created this database record.
        • createdDatetime
          Timestamp createdDatetime
          Contains Created Timestamp of database record
        • id
          long id
          Non Business primary key
        • modifiedBy
          String modifiedBy
          Contains USER ID who modified this database record
        • modifiedDatetime
          Timestamp modifiedDatetime
          Contains Modified Timestamp of database record

    • Class com.sunilos.p4.bean.UserBean

      class UserBean extends BaseBean implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • confirmPassword
          String confirmPassword
          Confirm Password of User
        • dob
          Date dob
          Date of Birth of User
        • firstName
          String firstName
          First Name of User
        • gender
          String gender
          Gender of User
        • lastLogin
          Timestamp lastLogin
          Last login timestamp
        • lastLoginIP
          String lastLoginIP
          IP Address of User of his last login
        • lastName
          String lastName
          Last Name of User
        • lock
          String lock
          User Lock
        • login
          String login
          Login of User
        • mobileNo
          String mobileNo
          MobielNo of User
        • password
          String password
          Password of User
        • registeredIP
          String registeredIP
          IP Address of User from where User was registred.
        • roleId
          long roleId
          Role of User
        • unSuccessfulLogin
          int unSuccessfulLogin
          Number of unsuccessful login attempt

          String name
          Name of the SELECT element
